What is the display panel type (OLED, IPS, etc.), peak brightness, and factory color gamut/coverage (sRGB, P3, AdobeRGB)?
What is the screen refresh rate (60 Hz, 120 Hz, etc.)?
Are the RAM and SSD user-upgradeable or soldered? If upgradable, how many SODIMM/M.2 slots are available?
What ports are provided (number/type of USB-C, Thunderbolt 4, HDMI, Ethernet, SD card)?
What is the charging adapter wattage and does it support USB‑C charging? Is USB‑C/Thunderbolt capable of powering external GPUs or high‑power docks?
What are real-world battery test results (web browsing, video playback, heavy load) vs. the listed 'up to 8 hours'?
What are thermal characteristics and sustained performance — does the CPU/GPU throttle under long loads (gaming/rendering/benchmarking)?
Is there a discrete GPU option in this model line, or is it strictly integrated graphics?
What is the webcam resolution and microphone quality? Is there a privacy shutter and Windows Hello/fingerprint reader?
What kind of SSD is installed (NVMe PCIe Gen3/Gen4) and is the full 4 TB a single drive or multiple drives/partitions?
Is there an active cooling/noise profile info (fan noise under load)?
What is the warranty period and are there extended warranty/accidental damage options?
Is the device fully compatible with Linux (if that’s a consideration)?
What is the exact weight in kilograms and the chassis dimensions for carrying-case compatibility?
